creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to beldin from comment #4)

Ok, thank you! Can you fork the qemu-bsd-user repo and make a pull request over there, please? http://github.com/qemu-bsd-user/qemu-bsd-user -> we require signed-off-by (git commit -s) to appease upstream's qemu guidelines. You can make just a single PR against bsd-user-rebase-3.1, Warner can cherry-pick it forward to the branch behind the -devel port.
